heading: Quick
overview

visual.title: Strategic Thinking
visual.caption: Every move counts, both on the board and in code

intro: Hey there! I'm Frank, and I build software. What began as small fixes for my own problems grew into solutions that help others too.
projectsLead: Just poke around, check out the projects, see what I've built. If something catches your eye, GREAT. If not, no worries, you still got to see some decent designs.
reality: These projects are REAL things I've built for REAL problems. Some worked out better than others, but that's how it goes.
aboutLead: If you'd like to read my backstory, education, and experience, head over to the ABOUT page. It's written as a story to keep things engaging.
